extraction_notes: PDF obtained from OpenCity.in (GBA Corporation Budgets 2026-27 dataset): https://data.opencity.in/dataset/gba-corporation-budgets-2026-27 — English speech (47 pages, 55,978 chars) and a separate Kannada speech PDF are published.
The English PDF extracts cleanly via pdfplumber (0 CID tokens) so no Tesseract OCR was necessary for this corporation. Kannada PDF was downloaded as backup but not required.

Speech is structured as 115 numbered paragraphs (with items 1-115 in the English PDF) organised under section headings: Revenue, Assets, Advertisement, Land Acquisition and TDR, Urban Planning, Administration, Sanitation, Welfare, Public Relations, Finance and Accounts, Horticulture, Lakes, Education, Health, Animal Husbandry, Public Works.
Amounts quoted in crore (1 crore = 100 lakh) are converted to lakhs here for consistency with the rest of this codebase.

Some items are revenue targets (property tax, B-Khata/A-Khata conversion, Premium FAR, advertisement fees) rather than expenditures; they are captured with category 'other' and tagged as revenue items via their function mapping.

Items without a specific named scheme, quoted amount, or concrete project have been omitted per spec (e.g. general 'we will increase transparency' statements). All 115 numbered speech items were reviewed; only those with concrete named initiatives, specific quoted amounts, or identifiable schemes are included.
Page numbers refer to English-section pages as they appear in the PDF (speech body spans pages 1-43; summary tables on pages 44-47).

projects.name: Total own revenue target for 2026-27
projects.description: BWCC target for total revenue from standardised SOPs, staff training, and bringing untaxed properties into the tax net.
projects.verbatim_quote: we expect total revenue of Rs. 1964.60 Crores. We will achieve this target by adopting standardized operating procedures, enhancing the capacity of officers and staff through multi-level training, and identifying properties outside the tax net to bring them under taxation.

projects.name: B-Khata to A-Khata property conversion
projects.description: Conversion of B-Khata (revenue records without clear title) to A-Khata to confirm property rights, unlock bank loans and boost investment; expected revenue Rs. 563 crore in 2026-27.
projects.verbatim_quote: the conversion of B-Khata to A-Khata not only benefits citizens but is also expected to generate approximately Rs. 563.00 Crores in revenue for the Corporation this year.

projects.name: e-Khata online registration for public land properties
projects.description: New provision allowing citizens to submit documents online and obtain new e-Khatas for public land properties within BWCC limits; expected revenue Rs. 18 crore.
projects.verbatim_quote: To facilitate the distribution of electronic documents for public land properties within the Bengaluru West City Corporation limits, we have made a new provision to register new accounts... This is expected to generate revenue of approximately Rs. 18.00 Crores.

projects.name: Digital IT application for corporation property permissions
projects.description: Contactless digital application for permissions related to community halls, renting corporation buildings, land leases, stadium and film-shooting bookings, and other approval processes.
projects.verbatim_quote: we are developing a digital IT application for permissions related to community halls, renting corporation buildings, land leases, booking stadiums and film shooting locations, and other approval processes.

projects.name: IT equipment for revenue inspectors and e-Office
projects.description: Purchase 122 computers and 83 printers through tender to enhance revenue inspector performance and strengthen the e-Office system.
projects.verbatim_quote: To enhance the performance of the Corporation's revenue inspectors and strengthen the e-Office system, we plan to purchase 122 computers and 83 printers through tender.

projects.name: Digital asset survey and GIS tracking system
projects.description: Comprehensive digital survey of BWCC's 1,946 assets (buildings, schools, hospitals, playgrounds, parks, lakes, dhobi ghats); documented digitally and tracked via GIS-enabled web portal/mobile app. Includes legal action to repossess assets not currently in corporation possession.
projects.verbatim_quote: We will conduct a comprehensive survey of the Corporation's assets. All assets will be documented digitally and a tracking system will be established using GIS facilities, maps and precise IDs.

projects.name: Chain-link fencing for vacant corporation plots
projects.description: Install chain-link fencing around vacant BWCC plots including properties transferred from the Bangalore Development Authority (BDA) to prevent unauthorised encroachment.
projects.verbatim_quote: we have reserved Rs. 5.00 Crores for installing chain-link fencing for vacant plots. This includes properties transferred from the BDA (Bangalore Development Authority) to the corporation.

projects.name: Private-sector outdoor advertisement tenders under GBA Rules 2025
projects.description: Under the Greater Bengaluru Area (Advertisement) Rules 2025, permit private institutions to install commercial advertisements within BWCC limits via tender.
projects.verbatim_quote: The Greater Bengaluru Area (Advertisement) Rules 2025 have come into effect. We are taking steps to permit private institutions to install commercial advertisements within the city corporation limits through tenders. This is expected to generate revenue of approximately Rs. 116.00 Crores.

projects.name: 50 new skywalks with commercial advertisements
projects.description: Construct skywalks at 50 locations where the public requires them; commercial advertisements on these skywalks expected to generate additional Rs. 2 crore revenue.
projects.verbatim_quote: We are formulating plans to construct skywalks at 50 locations where the public requires them. Allowing commercial advertisements on these skywalks is expected to generate an additional revenue of Rs. 2.00 Crores for the corporation.

projects.name: TDR Cell under the Competent Commissioner
projects.description: Establish a Transferable Development Rights (TDR) Cell under the commissioner per the 07/02/2026 circular to provide TDR/DRC for properties acquired from owners.
projects.verbatim_quote: We have established a TDR (Transferable Development Rights) cell under the competent commissioner in the corporation.

projects.name: TDR Exchange Cell for online sale and purchase
projects.description: Establish a TDR Exchange Cell enabling online exchange, sale and purchase of Development Rights Certificates (TDR/DRC) with full public information.
projects.verbatim_quote: We will also establish a TDR Exchange Cell for the exchange of TDR.

projects.name: Land acquisition reserve for FY 2026-27
projects.description: Reserved funds for land acquisition to enable road widening, circle development, creation of commercial assets, and multi-level car parking systems.
projects.verbatim_quote: we have reserved Rs. 20.00 Crores for land acquisition in this financial year. This will facilitate road widening, development of circles, creation of commercial assets, and multi-level car parking systems.

projects.name: Digitisation of land acquisition process (Forms 1 & 3, TDR/DRC)
projects.description: Digitise the identification of land for acquisition, Forms 1 and 3 notifications of purpose, and provisional approval orders using information technology to enable transparent TDR/DRC distribution.
projects.verbatim_quote: We will digitize the identification of land for acquisition, notifications in Forms 1 and 3 regarding the purpose of acquisition, and provisional approval orders using information technology.

projects.name: Ittamadu Road widening
projects.description: Widen Ittamadu Road from 10 m to 18 m over 5 km length.
projects.verbatim_quote: Ittamadu Road (Widening from 10 m to 18 m, length 5 km)

projects.name: Kurubarahalli Main Road widening
projects.description: Widen Kurubarahalli Main Road from 12 m to 24 m over 1.4 km length.
projects.verbatim_quote: Kurubarahalli Main Road (Widening from 12 m to 24 m, length 1.4 km)

projects.name: Mahalakshmipura Access Road widening
projects.description: Widen Mahalakshmipura Access Road from 15 m to 24 m over 3 km length.
projects.verbatim_quote: Mahalakshmipura Access Road (Widening from 15 m to 24 m, length 3 km)

projects.name: Hanumanth Nagar Main Road widening
projects.description: Widen Hanumanth Nagar Main Road from 12 m to 18 m over 4.5 km length.
projects.verbatim_quote: Hanumanth Nagar Main Road (Widening from 12 m to 18 m, length 4.5 km)

projects.name: Herohalli Access Road widening
projects.description: Widen Herohalli Access Road from 9.50 m to 15 m over 0.90 km length.
projects.verbatim_quote: Herohalli Access Road (Widening from 9.50 m to 15 m, length 0.90 km)

projects.name: Thyagarajanagar Main Road widening
projects.description: Widen Thyagarajanagar Main Road from 12 m to 24 m over 1.27 km length.
projects.verbatim_quote: Thyagarajanagar Main Road (Widening from 12 m to 24 m, length 1.27 km)

projects.name: Hosakerehalli Main Road to ORR widening
projects.description: Widen road from Hosakerehalli Main Road to Outer Ring Road from 12 m to 24 m over 1.9 km length.
projects.verbatim_quote: Road from Hosakerehalli Main Road to Outer Ring Road (Widening from 12 m to 24 m, length 1.9 km)

projects.name: Katriguppe Main Road to Vidyapeeta Circle widening
projects.description: Widen road from Katriguppe Main Road to 50 Feet Road Vidyapeeta Circle from 12 m to 24 m over 0.78 km length.
projects.verbatim_quote: Road from Katriguppe Main Road to 50 Feet Road Vidyapeeta Circle (Widening from 12 m to 24 m, length 0.780 km)

projects.name: e-Swathu online single-site plan approval
projects.description: New online initiative via e-Swathu application for approval of single-site building plans for revenue land or B-Khata properties; projected fee revenue Rs. 254.20 crore in 2026-27.
projects.verbatim_quote: we have undertaken a new initiative through the online e-Swathu application for the approval of single-site plans... The total estimated fees collected from all the above approvals during the financial year 2026-27, amounting to Rs. 254.20 Crores.

projects.name: Premium FAR revenue (new policy)
projects.description: Expected revenue under the new Government Premium FAR policy to be used for all-round development of Bengaluru city.
projects.verbatim_quote: under the new government policy (Premium FAR), we expect revenue of approximately Rs. 380.00 Crores in the financial year 2026-27.

projects.name: Single Window Approval revenue
projects.description: Single Window Approval facility for the public with expected revenue of Rs. 200 crore.
projects.verbatim_quote: To facilitate the public, we have provided an opportunity for Single Window Approval, from which we expect an estimated revenue of Rs. 200.00 Crores.

projects.name: Urban Design Cell and Master Plan
projects.description: Establish an Urban Design Cell and prepare the Master Plan via the GBA; BWCC's share for strengthening urban planning and infrastructure design.
projects.verbatim_quote: we have allocated a total of Rs. 5.50 Crores for establishing an Urban Design Cell and preparing a Master Plan.

projects.name: Cadre & Recruitment (C&R) process for staff
projects.description: Expedite C&R finalisation, review departmental requirements, and fill vacancies via rapid recruitment, training, and performance monitoring.
projects.verbatim_quote: We will take steps to expedite the finalization of the C & R (Cadre & Recruitment) process to provide timely and effective services to the public.

projects.name: Staff training from reputed institutions
projects.description: Organise timely training for BWCC staff from reputed training institutions to enhance administrative skills, capacity building, and personality development.
projects.verbatim_quote: We are organizing timely training for staff from reputed training institutions to enhance administrative skills, capacity building, and personality development of the West City Corporation staff.

projects.name: Staff attendance management application
projects.description: Record staff attendance through a management application to ensure timely engagement in duty.
projects.verbatim_quote: We will take steps to record attendance through an application for managing staff attendance.

projects.name: Information Technology Cell and Integrated Command and Control Center
projects.description: Establish an Information Technology Cell and an Integrated Command and Control Center under the Brand Bengaluru-Tech Bengaluru initiative within GBA.
projects.verbatim_quote: we have reserved an amount of Rs. 6.00 Crores in this year's budget for establishing an Information Technology Cell and an Integrated Command and Control Center.

projects.name: Mechanical sweepers for arterial and sub-arterial roads
projects.description: Purchase mechanical sweepers and obtain one rental mechanical sweeper per assembly constituency to clean arterial and sub-arterial roads across BWCC.
projects.verbatim_quote: we have already called tenders for the purchase of mechanical sweepers and for obtaining one mechanical sweeper per assembly constituency on a rental basis... We have reserved Rs. 25.00 Crores for this purpose.

projects.name: Solid Waste Management (BSWML) allocation
projects.description: Allocation to the Bengaluru Solid Waste Management Limited (BSWML) for improving waste collection, segregation, recycling and scientific disposal via modern equipment, vehicles and technology.
projects.verbatim_quote: To improve waste collection, segregation, recycling and scientific disposal methods by introducing modern equipment, vehicles and technology, we have reserved a total of Rs. 300.00 Crores in this year's budget for the SWM (Solid Waste Management) organization.

projects.name: 10 solid waste transfer stations (one per assembly constituency)
projects.description: Set up 10 transfer stations (one per assembly constituency) for efficient scientific collection and transport of solid waste; coordinated with BSWML.
projects.verbatim_quote: It is proposed to set up 10 transfer stations, one per assembly constituency, for the efficient and scientific collection and transportation of solid waste collected from households within the city corporation limits. This project will be formulated in coordination with BSWML.

projects.name: Welfare programmes for SC/ST, Pourakarmikas, backward classes, minorities and others
projects.description: Educational, financial, health and other grants for SC/ST, Pourakarmikas (sanitation workers), backward classes, minorities, economically weaker sections, women and specially-abled residents; combined with basic infrastructure development works in these areas.
projects.verbatim_quote: For these welfare programs and for development works under basic infrastructure, we have reserved a total of Rs. 334.99 Crores in the budget for the year 2026-27.

projects.name: Single-house scheme + Amrita Mahotsava housing assistance
projects.description: Rs. 5 lakh per eligible beneficiary (SC/ST, Pourakarmikas, backward classes, minorities, EWS, women, specially-abled) under the single-house scheme, plus Rs. 5 lakh each for Amrita Mahotsava housing-complex units for landless individuals.
projects.verbatim_quote: we will provide assistance of Rs. 5.00 Lakhs each. Additionally, under the Amrita Mahotsava scheme, we will provide assistance of Rs. 5.00 Lakhs each for purchasing units in housing complexes constructed by the government for landless individuals. We have reserved a total of Rs. 71.64 Crores for this.

projects.name: Basic infrastructure in SC/ST/Pourakarmika/backward-class/minority/specially-abled residential areas
projects.description: Reserved allocation for basic infrastructure development works in areas where SC/ST, Pourakarmikas, backward classes, minorities and specially-abled persons reside within BWCC limits.
projects.verbatim_quote: We have reserved a total of Rs. 150.97 Crores for development works under basic infrastructure in areas where Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, Pourakarmikas (sanitation workers), backward classes, minorities and specially-abled persons reside within the corporation limits.

projects.name: Sarathi scheme: retrofit autos, cars, EV two-wheelers, electric wheelchairs
projects.description: Two-wheelers with additional wheels for specially-abled, electric wheelchairs, autos/cars under the Sarathi scheme for all classes, and welfare for general-category and third-gender beneficiaries.
projects.verbatim_quote: We are implementing welfare programs such as distributing two-wheelers with additional wheels for specially-abled persons and electric wheelchairs; distributing autos and cars under the Sarathi scheme for all classes... For this purpose, we have reserved Rs. 23.34 Crores in the current financial year.

projects.name: Scholarships, laptops, skill training, sewing machines & misc welfare
projects.description: Health programmes, fee reimbursement from 1st standard to higher education, laptops to degree students, skill training (driving/beautician/fashion designing), free EV two-wheelers for working women and Pourakarmikas, free sewing machines, scholarships for intellectually disabled children, grants for small entrepreneurs, health insurance, sports, prosthetic-limb expenses, and foreign education grants.
projects.verbatim_quote: We have reserved a total of Rs. 47.17 Crores for programs including scholarships for intellectually disabled children, grants for small-scale entrepreneurs, health insurance, sports, medical expenses for prosthetic limbs, and grants for foreign education.

projects.name: E-vending vehicles and vending zones for street vendors
projects.description: Assistance program to provide high-quality e-vending vehicles for street vendors and to identify/develop well-equipped vending zones to reduce traffic congestion.
projects.verbatim_quote: We have launched an assistance program to provide high-quality e-vending vehicles to improve the lives of street vendors. We will identify and develop well-equipped vending zones... We have reserved Rs. 13.35 Crores for this purpose.

projects.name: Kempegowda Study Centre and grant-in-aid institutions
projects.description: Financial assistance including to the Kempegowda Study Centre and other grant-in-aid institutions.
projects.verbatim_quote: We have reserved a total of Rs. 10.50 Crores to provide financial assistance, including to the Kempegowda Study Centre and other grant-in-aid institutions.

projects.name: BWCC social media presence (Facebook, X) and e-newsletter
projects.description: Manage Facebook and X (Twitter) social-media accounts to inform citizens about BWCC development works; launch a separate e-newsletter on corporation initiatives.
projects.verbatim_quote: we are managing Facebook and X (Twitter) social media accounts... the Public Relations Department will launch a separate e-newsletter regarding the development works being undertaken by the corporation.

projects.name: Monthly digital news bulletins
projects.description: Publish digital news bulletins monthly describing BWCC's development programs, projects, achievements, and public services.
projects.verbatim_quote: We will publish digital news bulletins monthly regarding various development programs, projects, achievements, and public services of the corporation.

projects.name: Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) system
projects.description: Establish a DBT system to ensure welfare-scheme assistance reaches beneficiaries transparently and on time.
projects.verbatim_quote: To effectively implement various welfare schemes, we will establish a Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) system to ensure assistance reaches beneficiaries transparently and in a timely manner.

projects.name: Internal Audit Cell
projects.description: Establish an Audit Cell for effective internal audits, comprehensive account review, and monitoring of project financial management.
projects.verbatim_quote: we have allocated the necessary funds in the budget for establishing an Audit Cell. This unit will enable effective internal audits, comprehensive review of accounts, and monitoring of the financial management of projects.

projects.name: IFMS host-to-host integration and e-Receipt Portal
projects.description: Record online payment transactions on real-time basis via host-to-host IFMS + bank integration; integrate all receipts via an e-Receipt Portal linked to bank payment gateways.
projects.verbatim_quote: We are making payments of the Bengaluru West City Corporation online through host-to-host integration with the IFMS... This year, we intend to accept all receipts online by integrating them with bank payment gateways through an e-Receipt Portal.

projects.name: e-Fund Transfer Portal and e-Register Portal
projects.description: Upgrade IFMS and develop a new e-Fund Transfer Portal and e-Register Portal for online internal/inter-office fund transfers and statutory deduction remittances.
projects.verbatim_quote: We will upgrade the existing IFMS software and develop a new e-Fund Transfer Portal and e-Register Portal.

projects.name: Park maintenance (496 parks)
projects.description: Annual maintenance of 496 parks within BWCC limits.
projects.verbatim_quote: For the year 2026-27, we have reserved Rs. 47.45 Crores and Rs. 6.32 Crores respectively for these tasks.

projects.name: Park development and upgrading
projects.description: Development and upgrading works for parks across BWCC.
projects.verbatim_quote: For the year 2026-27, we have reserved Rs. 47.45 Crores and Rs. 6.32 Crores respectively for these tasks.

projects.name: Wire fencing for parks
projects.description: Install wire fencing around parks to prevent encroachment.
projects.verbatim_quote: we have reserved Rs. 3.25 Crores for installing wire fencing for parks.

projects.name: Miyawaki forests in each constituency
projects.description: Establish Miyawaki dense native-species forests in parks, schools and vacant roadside areas of each constituency to create rapid urban greening.
projects.verbatim_quote: we will formulate plans to establish 'Miyawaki forests' (Miyawaki Forests) in each constituency... We have reserved Rs. 1.00 Crore for this purpose.

projects.name: Specially-abled-friendly parks, pet parks, and senior citizen libraries
projects.description: Plan at least one specially-abled friendly park per division, pet-friendly (domestic animal) parks, and senior citizen libraries.
projects.verbatim_quote: We will make plans to establish at least one specially-abled friendly park per divisions and pet parks (Domestic Animal Park). We will also make plans to establish libraries for senior citizens.

projects.name: Pay & Use EV charging points on corporation properties
projects.description: Install Pay & Use electric-vehicle charging stations in BWCC offices, grounds and municipal properties to support energy conservation and environmental protection.
projects.verbatim_quote: A plan will be formulated to install Pay & Use electric charging point stations in the offices, grounds and municipal properties of the West city Corporation.

projects.name: Rainwater harvesting units in 20 parks
projects.description: Install rainwater-harvesting units in 20 parks at Rs. 10 lakh each to conserve water and increase groundwater levels.
projects.verbatim_quote: we will undertake a project to install rainwater harvesting units in 20 parks. We will construct each unit at a cost of Rs. 10.00 Lakhs... We have reserved Rs. 2.00 Crores for this purpose in this year's budget.

projects.name: Cycle tracks across divisions and around Nayandahalli Lake
projects.description: Construct cycle tracks in at least 5 locations per department and around Nayandahalli Lake in Govindarajanagar for health and environmental protection.
projects.verbatim_quote: we will make plans to construct cycle tracks in at least 5 locations per department and around Nayandahalli Lake in Govindarajanagar Assembly Constituency.

projects.name: Mahalakshmi Layout parks comprehensive development
projects.description: Comprehensive development of Anjaneya Temple Park, UAS Park, Kuvempu Park, and Kirloskar Colony Park in Mahalakshmi Layout constituency.
projects.verbatim_quote: For the comprehensive development of Anjaneya Temple Park, UAS Park, Kuvempu Park, and Kirloskar Colony Park in the Mahalakshmi Layout constituency, we have reserved Rs. 5.00 Crores in this year's budget.

projects.name: Annual lake maintenance (49 lakes)
projects.description: Annual maintenance for the 49 lakes across BWCC's Yeshwanthpur, Dasarahalli, Rajarajeshwari Nagar, Basavanagudi, Vijayanagar, Govindarajanagar, Malleshwaram and Padmanabhanagar assembly constituencies.
projects.verbatim_quote: In the budget for 2026-27, we have reserved a total of Rs. 10.75 Crores for lake development. This includes Rs. 10.00 Crores for annual lake maintenance and Rs. 6.25 Crores for constructing boundary wire fencing.

projects.name: Lake boundary wire fencing
projects.description: Construct boundary wire fencing around lakes within BWCC limits.
projects.verbatim_quote: This includes Rs. 10.00 Crores for annual lake maintenance and Rs. 6.25 Crores for constructing boundary wire fencing.

projects.name: Lake aerators, bio-enzymes, and digital water-quality monitoring
projects.description: Lake rejuvenation works including installing aerators, bio-enzyme treatment, digital equipment to improve water quality, sluice gates, CCTVs, and creating public spaces.
projects.verbatim_quote: This proposal includes works for lake rejuvenation and development, including installing aerators, using bio-enzymes, and establishing digital equipment to improve lake water quality, installing sluice gates, CCTVs, and creating public spaces.

projects.name: Yediyur & Chikkallasandra lakes rejuvenation
projects.description: Clear encroachments around Yediyur Lake and Chikkallasandra Lake, desilt to increase water storage, and carry out phased comprehensive development.
projects.verbatim_quote: we have reserved Rs. 5.00 Crores in the current financial year for clearing encroachments around Yediyur Lake and Chikkallasandra Lake, desilting to increase their water storage capacity, and for the phased comprehensive development of these lakes.

projects.name: Karnataka Darshana 3-day educational tour
projects.description: 3-day educational tour for high school students covering historical sites in Kittur Karnataka, Kalyana Karnataka, and Coastal Karnataka.
projects.verbatim_quote: we will conduct a 3-day "Karnataka Darshana" educational tour for high school students, covering historical sites in Kituru Karnataka, Kalyan Karnataka, and Coastal Karnataka. We have reserved Rs. 2.00 Crores for this.

projects.name: Smart Schools (5 selected schools)
projects.description: Convert 5 selected BWCC schools (Shaktiganapati Nagar, Sriramapura, Kodandarampura, Basavanagudi, Vijayanagar) into 'Smart Schools' with easy, interesting and quality digital education.
projects.verbatim_quote: we will convert a total of 5 selected schools into 'Smart Schools'. We have reserved Rs. 1.00 Crore for this.

projects.name: Safe School scheme (phased)
projects.description: Phased 'Safe School' scheme with CCTV surveillance, security measures, cleanliness facilities, and safe infrastructure in BWCC school environments.
projects.verbatim_quote: We will implement the 'Safe School' scheme in phases to promote student safety and quality digital education. Under this scheme, we will provide CCTV surveillance, security measures, cleanliness facilities, and safe infrastructure in the school environment.

projects.name: Digital libraries in each BWCC zone
projects.description: Establish environmentally friendly digital libraries within each BWCC zone to provide fast and comprehensive information to students and the public.
projects.verbatim_quote: We will establish environmentally friendly digital libraries (Digital Library) within each zone of the corporation to provide fast and comprehensive information on various facilities to students and the public.

projects.name: Shuchi free sanitary pads and incinerators for girl students
projects.description: Distribute free sanitary pads to girl students from 5th standard to PG colleges under the State Shuchi Program; install sanitary-pad incinerators.
projects.verbatim_quote: we are distributing free sanitary pads to girl students studying from 5th standard in primary schools to post-graduate degree colleges within the West City Corporation. We also intend to install sanitary pad incinerators for the well-being of girl students.

projects.name: Kempambudi Ward-101 corporation school additional floor
projects.description: Additional floor and necessary facilities for the corporation school building in Kempambudi Ward-101, Basavanagudi Assembly Constituency.
projects.verbatim_quote: We have reserved Rs. 2.00 Crores for providing an additional floor and necessary facilities to the corporation school building in Kempambudi Ward-101, Basavanagudi Assembly Constituency.

projects.name: Total education allocation 2026-27
projects.description: Total allocation for public education across 28 kindergarten schools, 5 primary schools, 10 high schools, 5 PU colleges, 1 degree and 1 PG college.
projects.verbatim_quote: Overall, we have reserved Rs. 44.35 Crores for education in this year's budget.

projects.name: Brand Bengaluru upgrade of 6 hospitals (multi-year)
projects.description: Upgrade 6 BWCC hospitals (Srirampura Referral, Azadnagar Maternity, Nandini Layout Maternity, Palace Guttahalli Maternity, Moodalapalya Maternity, M.C. Layout Multi-Specialty) as per EDP 2022 with modular OTs, labour rooms, labs, additional wards, 100 KVA generators, fire safety, UPS, medical equipment, furniture, Jeevan ambulances, etc. Total multi-year spend Rs. 95.73 crore (build Rs. 64.68 cr, machinery Rs. 27.29 cr, emergency Rs. 3.76 cr).
projects.verbatim_quote: we are upgrading the following 6 hospitals under the "Brand Bengaluru Scheme" at a cost of Rs.95.73 Crores... The corporation has reserved Rs. 95.73 Crores in this and the next two financial years' budgets.

projects.name: Brand Bengaluru - Healthy Bengaluru (current year)
projects.description: Current-year allocation under Brand Bengaluru - Healthy Bengaluru to upgrade BWCC hospitals and health facilities.
projects.verbatim_quote: For the current year, under Brand Bengaluru - Healthy Bengaluru, we have reserved Rs. 35.00 Crores.

projects.name: 20 additional Smart Virtual Clinics
projects.description: Extend the Central Clinical Command Center / Smart Virtual Clinic scheme to 20 more health centres in BWCC (28 already operational in Sadashivanagar).
projects.verbatim_quote: We will extend this scheme to 20 more health centers in the West Corporation, for which we have reserved an additional estimated fund of Rs. 4.00 Crores.

projects.name: Vector control: fogging, power spraying
projects.description: Deploy gangmen and autos division-wise for spraying, fogging, and power-spraying programs to control mosquito-borne diseases.
projects.verbatim_quote: To control diseases spread by mosquitoes, we have deployed gang men and autos division-wise for spraying, fogging, and power spraying programs. We have reserved Rs. 9.00 Crores for this.

projects.name: Jayadeva Institute regional cardiology centre at Govindarajanagar
projects.description: Establish a regional centre of the Jayadeva Institute of Cardiology at the BBMP Multi-Specialty Hospital in Govindarajanagar; total project cost Rs. 25 crore (state government Rs. 15 crore under item 164, BWCC Rs. 10 crore).
projects.verbatim_quote: For establishing a regional center of the Jayadeva Institute of Cardiology at the BBMP Multi-Specialty Hospital in Govindarajanagar... we have reserved the remaining amount of Rs. 10.00 Crores in this year's budget.

projects.name: ABC-AR stray dog Animal Birth Control and Anti-Rabies program
projects.description: Continue ABC (Animal Birth Control - Anti Rabies) and AR programs in all wards to create a rabies-free, cruelty-free, healthy human-animal friendly society.
projects.verbatim_quote: We will continue ABC (Animal Birth Control - Anti Rabies) and AR (Anti Rabies) related programs in all wards of the corporation... We have reserved Rs. 1.12 Crores in the budget for this.

projects.name: 20 Animal Husbandry model wards
projects.description: Designate at least one ward per assembly constituency (total 20) as a model ward for the Animal Husbandry Department; sterilise and vaccinate 70% of stray dogs; public awareness on zoonotic diseases, co-existence and adoption; free vaccination for adopted strays; licensed hygienic meat shops; one pet-friendly park per assembly constituency.
projects.verbatim_quote: In the year 2026-27, we will designate at least one ward per assembly constituency as a model ward for the Animal Husbandry Department, totalling 20 wards in the corporation.

projects.name: Stray dog shelter (500 capacity) + ABC centre (200 surgeries)
projects.description: Construct and maintain a 500-capacity shelter for stray dogs and establish an ABC (Animal Birth Control) centre with 200 surgeries capacity.
projects.verbatim_quote: We will construct and maintain a shelter with a capacity of 500 for stray dogs. We will establish an ABC (Animal Birth Control) center with a capacity of 200 surgeries. We have reserved Rs. 2.00 Crores in the budget for this purpose.

projects.name: Chandra Layout 215-ft flagpole
projects.description: Constructed a 215-feet tall flagpole at Chandra Layout Circle in Vijayanagar Assembly Constituency for annual Republic Day and Independence Day celebrations.
projects.verbatim_quote: we have constructed a 215-feet tall flagpole at Chandra Layout Circle at a cost of Rs. 5.00 Crores.

projects.name: Vijayanagar Market AC building with shops for street vendors
projects.description: Air-conditioned building with shops in Vijayanagar Market area constructed to facilitate street vendors.
projects.verbatim_quote: we have constructed an air-conditioned building with shops in the Vijayanagar Market area at a cost of Rs. 11.00 Crores to facilitate street vendors.

projects.name: P.F. Layout multi-purpose building (Govindarajanagar)
projects.description: Multi-purpose building in P.F. Layout, Govindarajanagar: function hall on first floor, dining area on ground floor, terrace play area for children.
projects.verbatim_quote: we have commenced construction of a multi-purpose building with an allocation of Rs. 3.00 Crores. The specialty of this building is that it will have a function hall on the first floor for public events, a dining area on the ground floor, and a play area on the terrace for local children.

projects.name: Chennamanakere Layout sports building
projects.description: Sports building adjacent to Chennamanakere Layout playground with a 222.75 m skating track, shooting training centre (Phase 1 Rs. 7.30 cr), and badminton/table tennis courts (Phase 2 Rs. 4 cr). Total cost Rs. 11.30 crore.
projects.verbatim_quote: Adjacent to the Chennamanakere Layout playground, we have completed a sports building at a total cost of Rs. 11.30 Crores.

projects.name: A.N.K. Community Hall (Yediyur, Ward 167)
projects.description: Construct the Arakalagudu Narasingarao Krishna Rao (A.N.K.) Community Hall opposite Yediyur Lake, Ward 167, Padmanabhanagar, for economically weaker sections to hold weddings, receptions and other auspicious functions.
projects.verbatim_quote: the construction of the "A.N.K. (Arakalagudu Narasingarao Krishna Rao) Community Hall" opposite Yediyur Lake in Ward No. 167, Yediyur area, at a cost of Rs. 26.50 Crores.

projects.name: Kari Sandra Maternity Hospital (Ward 166)
projects.description: Maternity hospital constructed in Ward 166, Kari Sandra area (Padmanabhanagar) to provide low-cost treatment for economically weaker sections.
projects.verbatim_quote: we have constructed a "Maternity Hospital" in Ward No. 166, Kari Sandra area, at a cost of Rs. 12.00 Crores.

projects.name: BWCC Municipal Bonds (Rs. 200 crore + Rs. 26 crore Central incentive)
projects.description: Issue municipal bonds worth Rs. 200 crore; Rs. 26 crore Central Government incentive (Rs. 13 cr per Rs. 100 cr) expected; total Rs. 226 crore to be used for capital works.
projects.verbatim_quote: the West City Corporation will issue municipal bonds worth Rs. 200.00 Crores. The Central Government provides an incentive of Rs. 13.00 Crores for every Rs. 100.00 Crores of municipal bonds, thus we expect an incentive of Rs. 26.00 Crores for the corporation. We will utilize the total amount of Rs. 226.00 Crores obtained from municipal bonds for capital works.

projects.name: Jalasiri (Karnataka Water Security & Resilience) World Bank / ADB programme
projects.description: Externally aided project (World Bank/ADB) under the Karnataka Water Security and Resilience programme covering Rajarajeshwari Nagar zone, Dasarahalli zone, and parts of West under Koramangala Valley. Includes retaining walls, water harvesting structures, nature-based solutions, culverts, bridges, and flood-control structures for major stormwater drains.
projects.verbatim_quote: Under the "Karnataka Water Security and Resilience" program (Jalasiri), which includes the Rajarajeshwari Nagar zone, Dasarahalli zone, and parts of the West City Corporation under the Koramangala Valley Project, we will implement externally aided projects (World Bank/ADB).

projects.name: Special Infrastructure Capital Support Scheme (ASICS)
projects.description: Develop arterial and sub-arterial major roads and other basic infrastructure under the Special Infrastructure Capital Support Scheme (ASICS).
projects.verbatim_quote: Under the Special Infrastructure Capital Support Scheme (ASICS), we intend to develop arterial and sub-arterial major roads and other basic infrastructure at a total cost of Rs. 667.74 Crores.

projects.name: Main and sub-main road widening
projects.description: Widening of main and sub-main roads to reduce traffic congestion and provide smooth traffic facilities for the public.
projects.verbatim_quote: We have reserved Rs. 8.00 Crores for widening main and sub-main roads.

projects.name: CMIDS ward roads development (174.49 km)
projects.description: Develop 174.49 km of ward roads under the Chief Minister's Infrastructure Development Scheme (CMIDS).
projects.verbatim_quote: Under the Honourable Chief Minister's Infrastructure Development Scheme (CMIDS), we intend to develop a total of 174.49 km of ward roads at a total cost of Rs. 317.25 Crores.

projects.name: Junction beautification, footpaths, and skywalks (State budget item 297)
projects.description: Current-year reservation toward beautification of 175 junctions, upgradation of 500 km of pedestrian paths, and construction of 100 skywalks over three years using BWCC's own resources per Karnataka Budget 2026-27 item 297.
projects.verbatim_quote: for the beautification of 175 junctions, upgradation of 500 km of pedestrian paths, and construction of 100 skywalks over the next three years using the city corporations' own resources, we have reserved Rs. 50.00 Crores for this purpose in the corporation's budget for the current year.

projects.name: Per-ward capital works (Rs. 1.5 cr per ward)
projects.description: Per-ward capital works allocation of Rs. 1.5 crore per ward across 112 wards; total Rs. 168 crore.
projects.verbatim_quote: we have reserved Rs. 1.50 Crores for capital works and Rs. 75.00 Lakhs for maintenance works per ward, totaling Rs. 168.00 Crores and Rs. 85.50 Crores respectively.

projects.name: Per-ward maintenance works (Rs. 75 lakh per ward)
projects.description: Per-ward maintenance works allocation of Rs. 75 lakh per ward across 112 wards; total Rs. 85.50 crore.
projects.verbatim_quote: we have reserved Rs. 1.50 Crores for capital works and Rs. 75.00 Lakhs for maintenance works per ward, totaling Rs. 168.00 Crores and Rs. 85.50 Crores respectively.

projects.name: Goraguntepalya Transit Oriented Development (TOD)
projects.description: TOD special project at Goraguntepalya (Tumkur Road junction and metro station) with pedestrian-friendly paths, feeder bus services, parking, and road widening.
projects.verbatim_quote: we have reserved Rs. 2.00 Crores for developing pedestrian-friendly paths, feeder bus services, parking facilities around the Goraguntepalya Metro station, and for widening roads to facilitate smooth traffic for commuters.

projects.name: Vidyanagar-Chokkasandra stormwater drain bridge reconstruction (Ward 39)
projects.description: Demolish the old dilapidated bridge across the major stormwater drain in Vidyanagar Ward-39, Chokkasandra (Peenya Industrial Area) and construct a new one.
projects.verbatim_quote: we have reserved Rs. 1.00 Crore in the current financial year to demolish this bridge and construct a new one.

projects.name: Disciplined parking policy in markets and commercial areas
projects.description: Tender disciplined parking in markets and commercial areas of each assembly constituency to reduce illegal parking and ease traffic; additional revenue from EV and parking fees.
projects.verbatim_quote: to ease traffic, we have called for tender parking. We expect additional revenue for the corporation from EV (Electric Vehicle) and parking fees.

projects.name: 10 towing vehicles (one per assembly constituency)
projects.description: Obtain 10 towing vehicles (one per assembly constituency) on contract basis through the Traffic Police to tow vehicles in no-parking zones and abandoned vehicles.
projects.verbatim_quote: we will take steps to obtain a total of 10 towing vehicles, one per assembly constituency on a contract basis. Through the traffic police, we will tow vehicles parked in no-parking zones or abandoned vehicles.

projects.name: Multi-level car parking systems
projects.description: Identify suitable locations and provide multi-level car parking systems to reduce roadside parking inconvenience.
projects.verbatim_quote: we will make plans to identify suitable locations and provide multi-level car parking systems.

projects.name: Kempegowda Bhavan at Hampinagar Ward-133 (Vijayanagar)
projects.description: Construction of Kempegowda Bhavan in Hampinagar Ward-133, Vijayanagar Assembly Constituency.
projects.verbatim_quote: For the construction of the Kempegowda Bhavan in Hampinagar Ward-133, Vijayanagar Assembly Constituency, we have reserved an amount of Rs. 25.00 Crores in the current financial year.

projects.name: QR code nameplates on BWCC roads
projects.description: Install QR codes on nameplates on all roads within BWCC limits to provide information on citizen services and linked officers/employees/staff.
projects.verbatim_quote: We will take steps to install QR codes on nameplates on all roads in the West City Corporation to provide information about citizen services and the officers, employees, and staff related to the utility of daily services.

projects.name: Rooftop solar on crematoria and BWCC buildings
projects.description: Install rooftop solar panels at 5 human crematoria and 1 animal crematorium within BWCC limits; phased solar-project rollout for all BWCC buildings.
projects.verbatim_quote: We have reserved an amount of Rs. 2.00 Crores in the budget to implement the solar project in phases for all corporation buildings in the Bengaluru West City Corporation to save electricity.

projects.name: LED streetlight replacement (1,12,119 sodium lights)
projects.description: Replace 1,12,119 sodium street lights with LED street lights under the 'Foundation for a Green Future - Bengaluru West City Corporation' initiative (projected 65.95% electricity savings).
projects.verbatim_quote: The project to replace 1,12,119 sodium street lights with LED street lights within the Bengaluru West City Corporation limits is underway, under the initiative "Foundation for a Green Future - Bengaluru West City Corporation".

projects.name: Kumbalagodu electric crematorium (Yeshwanthpur)
projects.description: Development of the Kumbalagodu electric crematorium in Yeshwanthpur Assembly Constituency.
projects.verbatim_quote: We have reserved an additional Rs. 10.00 Crores in the current budget for the development of the Kumbalagodu electric crematorium in Yeshwanthpur Assembly Constituency.

projects.name: Dr. Rajkumar Auditorium rejuvenation (PPP)
projects.description: PPP rejuvenation of Dr. Rajkumar Auditorium, and upgradation of auditorium infrastructure in all assembly constituencies with modern sound/light, seating and facilities.
projects.verbatim_quote: we will undertake the rejuvenation of Dr. Rajkumar Auditorium in a Public-Private Partnership (PPP) model. We will upgrade the infrastructure of available auditoriums in all assembly constituencies.

projects.name: Malleshwaram Assembly Constituency comprehensive development
projects.description: Comprehensive development works in the Malleshwaram Assembly Constituency.
projects.verbatim_quote: We have reserved an amount of Rs. 5.00 Crores in the current year's budget for the comprehensive development of the Malleshwaram Assembly Constituency.

projects.name: Rajarajeshwari Nagar Assembly Constituency comprehensive development
projects.description: Comprehensive development works in the Rajarajeshwari Nagar Assembly Constituency.
projects.verbatim_quote: We have reserved an amount of Rs. 5.00 Crores in the current year's budget for the comprehensive development of the Rajarajeshwari Nagar Assembly Constituency.

projects.name: Dasarahalli Assembly Constituency comprehensive development
projects.description: Comprehensive development works in the Dasarahalli Assembly Constituency.
projects.verbatim_quote: We have reserved an amount of Rs. 4.00 Crores in the current year's budget for the comprehensive development of the Dasarahalli Assembly Constituency.

projects.name: Gyanasoudha Sports Activity Center pilot (Nagarabhavi)
projects.description: Pilot project at Gyanasoudha Sports Activity Center and Auditorium in Nagarabhavi: trained event managers, modern sports facilities, training camps, and cultural/social program management.
projects.verbatim_quote: we will launch a pilot project at the Gyanasoudha Sports Activity Center and Auditorium in Nagarabhavi.

projects.name: Ganesh Public Playground (Kengeri) upgrade
projects.description: Upgrade Ganesh Public Playground in Kengeri suburb with green grass, electric lighting, seating, sports equipment; generate revenue through rentals.
projects.verbatim_quote: We have reserved Rs. 5.00 Crores in the current year's budget for this purpose.

projects.name: Dr. Rajkumar Kalakshetra comprehensive development (Rajajinagar)
projects.description: Comprehensive development of Dr. Rajkumar Kalakshetra (memorial to Kannada actor Dr. Rajkumar) and overall development of Rajajinagar Assembly Constituency.
projects.verbatim_quote: we have reserved an amount of Rs. 5.00 Crores in the current year's budget for the comprehensive development of the Dr. Rajkumar Kalakshetra.

projects.name: Kumaraswamy Park observation tower (Hanumanthanagar Ward-102)
projects.description: Complete the incomplete Amrita Nagarothana (2022-23) observation tower at Kumaraswamy Park, Hanumanthanagar Ward-102, Basavanagudi, with amenities and surrounding-area development.
projects.verbatim_quote: We have reserved Rs. 3.00 Crores to complete the construction of this observation tower with necessary amenities and to develop the surrounding area.

projects.name: Thyagarajanagar Ward-104 multi-purpose building
projects.description: Multi-purpose building in Thyagarajanagar Ward-104, Basavanagudi (Amrita Nagarothana 2022-23) with legislator's office, MP's office and auditorium.
projects.verbatim_quote: We have reserved Rs. 1.00 Crore for this.

projects.name: Yeshwanthpur 50-bed maternity and children's hospital
projects.description: Construction of a 50-bed maternity and children's hospital in Yeshwanthpur Assembly Constituency; total project cost Rs. 20 crore with Rs. 10 crore reserved this year.
projects.verbatim_quote: We have formulated a plan to undertake the construction of a 50-bed maternity and children's hospital in Yeshwanthpur Assembly Constituency at a total cost of Rs. 20.00 Crores... We have reserved Rs. 10.00 Crores in this year's budget for the construction of this hospital.
